theme_notes: Taglines draw from: Viktor Orbán's landmark 16-year reign ending in Hungary's April 12 election; the US-Iran standoff where the US Navy seized the tanker Touska in the Strait of Hormuz, pushing a fragile ceasefire to the brink; a Chinese humanoid robot winning a Beijing half marathon faster than the human world record; and Japan's 7.4-magnitude earthquake that briefly triggered a tsunami alert.
settled: Settled up. Orbán thought 16 years of power was safe too.
Balanced like a ceasefire — great until someone seizes a tanker.
Zero owed. Even the Strait of Hormuz has better flow than your finances usually do.
youOwe: Pocket change. Even the robot at the Beijing half marathon is embarrassed for you.
You owe less than a barrel of Hormuz oil. The drama is roughly equal.
Small debt. Orbán held power 16 years. You can't hold $40.
Enough to matter. Iran closed a whole strait over less principle.
The ceasefire is shakier than your repayment timeline.
Your debt is growing like oil prices after a ship seizure.
A humanoid robot ran a full half marathon. You haven't run to the ATM once.
Hungary just ousted a 16-year autocrat. You can't settle $300.
The Strait of Hormuz handles 20% of global oil. Your debt handles 100% of this friendship.
Japan issued tsunami warnings. Your partner is entering similar alert status.
This is real money. Even Peter Magyar wouldn't campaign on forgiving this.
An Iranian cargo ship got seized. Your dignity is next.
You owe enough to personally destabilize a ceasefire.
A Chinese robot broke the human half-marathon record. You broke the human debt record.
Hungary had its most seismic political shift in a generation. This is yours.
The USS Spruance disabled a tanker to enforce the blockade. Noted.
You've out-Orbán'd Orbán. Sixteen years he held on. How long are YOU planning?
Japan's 7.4 quake moved the seafloor. This debt moved your relationship floor.
theyOwe: Almost settled. Like a ceasefire that's technically holding but very much not.
They owe you less than a barrel of sanctioned oil. Still owed.
Tiny debt. Still, Orbán didn't stay 16 years by forgetting what was owed.
The robot ran faster than this money is coming back.
Iran is stalling on peace talks. Your partner is taking notes.
A manageable sum. That's what they said about the Strait of Hormuz situation too.
You're owed enough that a 7.4 earthquake would be a reasonable response.
Oil prices spiked over a seized tanker. Your patience is spiking over this.
Hungary voted out an autocrat after 16 years. How long before you take action?
They owe you more than the entire Hungarian opposition campaign budget.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. You should consider closing the fridge.
A Chinese robot beat every human in a half marathon. Still faster than their repayment.
At this amount, you're not a partner. You're a sanctioned creditor state.
Arsenal made the Champions League semis. You made the semis of a mental breakdown.
Japan raised a tsunami alert over 9.8 feet of water. Your resentment is deeper.
The US Navy seized a tanker over unpaid principle. Options exist.
Five thousand plus. Orbán held Hungary hostage for 16 years. Respect the commitment.
A 7.4 earthquake, a seized tanker, your partner still hasn't Venmo'd you. Week from hell.
